title: The Oudh Taluqdar's Relief Act, 1870
full_text: The Oudh Taluqdar's Relief Act, 1870 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 187024 Act Number: 24 Enactment Date: 1870-09-07 Act Year: 1870 Short Title: The Oudh Taluqdar's Relief Act, 1870 Long Title: An Act to relieve from incumbrances the estates of Taluqdárs in Oudh. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Oudh Taluqdar's Relief Act, 1870 Show all section Section 1. Short title. Section 2. Interpretation-clause. Section 3. Power to vest management of taluqdar's property in an officer appointed by Chief Commissioner. Section 4. Effect of order. Section 5. Manager to receive rents and profits. Section 6. Notice to claimants against taluqdar. Section 7. Claim to contain full particulars. Section 8. Debt or liability not duty notified, to be barred. Section 9. Determination of debts and liabilities. Section 10. Appeal. Section 11. Scheme for settlement of debts and liabilities. Section 12. Restoration of taluqdar to his property. Section 13. Power to call for further particulars. Section 14. Power to summon witnesses and compel production of documents. Section 15. Power to administer oaths. Section 16. Investigation to be deemed a judicial proceeding. Section 17. Manager to have powers of a taluqdar. Section 18. Power to lease. Section 19. Power to raise money by mortgage or sale. Section 20. Power to make rules. Section 21. Power to appoint new Managers. Section 22. Managers to be public servants. Section 23. Bar of suits. Section 24. Petitions, &c., under Act exempt from Court fees. Section 25. Saving of jurisdiction of Courts in Oudh in respect of certain suits.
